events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`. The hi-lo mismatch at fit-up is a real ASME B31.3 nonconformance (internal misalignment exceeds allowable tolerance) — it's flagged `fail`, `risk: high`, with corrective actions (reject/rework the joint, re-verify tolerance, reweld, re-NDT, repeat hydrotest) before the joint can proceed.
